title: The GREYLOCK [HORROR]
description: Not here. Not now. Not anymore
body:
# **Welcome to "The GREYLOCK"**
a horror survival experience built on isolation and inspired by Dread modpack.
![Welcome To Greylock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8583f0492493a718a9b3e4622497b1bfdaafcd58_0.webp)
## Survival

You are abandoned in a world stripped of life. There are no friendly villages or safe havens. You cannot sleep to escape the night, and the Nether is gone, removing all normal game progression. Your only goal is to survive.
## New world generation
Explore a newly generated world with slightly modified terrain and somewhat safe structures.
### New loot
Scavenge for rare artifacts - these are your only tools and hope against the thoughforms.
### New Visuals and gameplay changes

Updated visuals and blood effects.
While playable solo, it is highly recommended to face this nightmare with a small group of friends.

****Warning: This modpack contains intense psychological horror, flashing lights, startling sounds, and pixelated ~~~~(obviosly, its Minecraft -_-)~~~~ blood effects. Player discretion is strongly advised.****

__This modpack has a trailer!__
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Eak_1l6an2I&t=8s

![Trailer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28e1f8a4f77432521290a22dd2cdb4ff22867f4d.png)
